sentences.arabic: تَصْنَعُ سَارَةُ مُحْتَوًى تَعْلِيمِيًّا عَلَى يُوتِيُوب عَنِ الطَّبْخِ الصِّحِّيِّ.
sentences.translation: Sara kreira edukativni sadržaj na YouTube-u o zdravoj ishrani.
sentences.translationEn: Sarah creates educational content on YouTube about healthy cooking.

sentences.arabic: حَصَلَتْ عَلَى مُتَابِعِينَ كَثِيرِينَ لِأَنَّ فِيدْيُوهَاتِهَا مُفِيدَةٌ وَبَسِيطَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Dobila je mnogo pratilaca jer su njeni videozapisi korisni i jednostavni.
sentences.translationEn: She gained many followers because her videos are useful and simple.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْمُؤَثِّرِينَ مُسَاعَدَةُ الْمُجْتَمَعِ عَنْ طَرِيقِ نَشْرِ الْأَفْكَارِ الْإِيجَابِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Influenseri mogu pomoći društvu širenjem pozitivnih ideja.
sentences.translationEn: Influencers can help society by spreading positive ideas.
